summary: AI health assistant web app with health tracking, daily routine management, emergency contact display, and AI chat assistance for health guidance
architectural_notes: Text-based AI chat interface (no voice recognition)
No external API integrations for emergency services

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication integration allowing users to securely log in and maintain their health data
Create a daily health routine tracking system where users can log and manage their daily health activities (exercise, meals, water intake, sleep, medications)
Build an AI chat interface for health guidance where users can ask health-related questions and receive text-based advice
Implement an emergency contacts management feature where users can store and display emergency contact information (name, relationship, phone number)
Design a clean, health-focused user interface with a calming color palette (soft greens, whites, light blues) and clear typography that promotes wellness and accessibility

Refine the typography system to use a professional font pairing with clear hierarchy: use a modern sans-serif for headings (weight 600-700) and body text (weight 400-500), ensuring all text is easily readable with appropriate line-heights and letter-spacing

Redesign the Layout component header and hero section with a professional aesthetic: replace casual styling with a clean, minimalist design featuring subtle shadows, refined spacing, and a more sophisticated layout structure

Update the EmergencyContacts component to use a more professional presentation: replace the prominent alert styling with a clean card-based layout, use subtle borders and shadows, and refine the contact list to look more like a professional directory

Refine the HealthRoutineTracker component with professional form styling: use clean input fields with subtle borders, organized sections with clear labels, and a polished submission button with appropriate hover states

Update the HealthChatInterface component with a professional chat design: use a clean message bubble design, refined color contrast, organized layout with clear sender distinction, and professional spacing between messages

Refine the color palette to maintain the health-focused theme while adding professional polish: adjust the existing OKLCH colors to use more sophisticated tones, reduce saturation slightly for a mature look, and ensure strong contrast ratios for accessibility

Update button and interactive element styling across all components to use consistent professional design: rounded corners with subtle radius, refined hover and active states, clear focus indicators, and appropriate elevation changes

new_feature_requests.summary: AI chat assistance for health guidance
